meta.note: Dated facts only — scheduled events and processes underway. No predictions. Each carries its source.

events.label: USMCA talks — next U.S.–Mexico negotiating round after the first review
events.mechanism: Trade under USMCA continues. The U.S. declined a 16-year extension, so the agreement now returns for annual review

events.label: INEGI CPI — first-fortnight July (INPC, biweekly)
events.mechanism: Updates the consumer-price index that anchors inflation readings

events.label: INEGI IGAE — monthly activity index (May reference)
events.mechanism: Updates the monthly economic-activity index

events.label: INEGI unemployment (ENOE, June reference)
events.mechanism: Updates the national unemployment rate

events.label: US Fed (FOMC) monetary-policy decision
events.mechanism: Sets the US federal funds target rate — drives the US–Mexico rate gap

events.label: INEGI GDP flash — Q2 2026 (estimación oportuna)
events.mechanism: Updates the quarterly GDP growth estimate

events.label: Banxico Survey of Expectations (monthly, early Aug)
events.mechanism: Updates private-sector forecasts for growth, inflation and the policy rate

events.label: Banxico remittances — June data (monthly)
events.mechanism: Updates monthly remittance inflows — a household-income and FX flow

events.label: Banxico monetary-policy decision
events.mechanism: Sets Banxico's overnight policy rate

events.label: INEGI CPI — monthly (INPC, July; headline + core)
events.mechanism: Updates headline and core consumer-price inflation

events.label: Foreign direct investment — H1 2026 (quarterly, late Aug)
events.mechanism: Updates quarterly foreign-direct-investment inflows

events.label: Presidential Informe de Gobierno (Sheinbaum, 2nd) — Congress opens
events.mechanism: Constitutional state-of-the-nation report opening the legislative year

events.label: Paquete Económico 2027 delivered to Congress (statutory deadline)
events.mechanism: Sets the government's proposed 2027 revenue and spending framework

events.label: US Fed (FOMC) monetary-policy decision (with projections)
events.mechanism: Sets the US federal funds target rate

events.label: Banxico monetary-policy decision
events.mechanism: Sets Banxico's overnight policy rate

events.label: US Fed (FOMC) monetary-policy decision
events.mechanism: Sets the US federal funds target rate

events.label: Ley de Ingresos 2027 — Senate approval deadline
events.mechanism: Fixes federal revenue and debt ceilings for 2027

events.label: Banxico monetary-policy decision
events.mechanism: Sets Banxico's overnight policy rate

events.label: Presupuesto de Egresos 2027 — Chamber of Deputies deadline
events.mechanism: Allocates federal spending for 2027

events.label: US Fed (FOMC) monetary-policy decision (with projections)
events.mechanism: Sets the US federal funds target rate

events.label: Banxico monetary-policy decision (final 2026)
events.mechanism: Sets Banxico's overnight policy rate

events.label: Midterm elections — all 500 deputies, 17 governorships, 2nd judicial-election cohort
events.mechanism: Renews the entire Chamber of Deputies and 17 state governorships

events.label: USMCA next annual joint review
events.mechanism: The agreement remains in force; the three countries review it annually until they extend it or the process reaches 2036
